get.description: Get a persisted run-detail snapshot suitable for frontend hydration.

Get lossless generation turns for a run.

Each turn contains the raw model request/response, extracted text,
tool calls, tool results, and optionally logprobs.

Query params:
    include: comma-separated fields to include.  ``logprobs`` adds
        ``token_ids`` and ``logprobs`` arrays (can be large).

schema.title: Response Get Generations Runs  Run Id  Generations Get

get.description:
Return score-over-step data for checkpoint evaluations.

Reads ``summary_json`` on ``RunRecord`` for checkpoint metadata
(``checkpoint_step``, ``checkpoint_path``) written by the eval
watcher, and aggregates ``RunTaskEvaluation.score`` per run.

Filter by ``definition_id`` or ``cohort_id``.

schema.title: Response Get Training Curves Runs Training Curves Get

get.description: List training sessions, optionally filtered by definition.

schema.title: Response Get Training Sessions Runs Training Sessions Get

get.description: Get per-step training metrics for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Training Metrics Runs Training Sessions  Session Id  Metrics Get

post.description: Start a batch of episodes. Returns immediately with batch_id.

get.description: Poll batch status. Returns trajectories when complete.

post.description:
Restart vLLM with a new checkpoint (full-weight RFT).

Blocks until the new vLLM process is healthy.

CohortDetailDto.title: CohortDetailDto
CohortDetailDto.description: Full payload for a single cohort detail page.

CohortRunRowDto.title: CohortRunRowDto
CohortRunRowDto.description: One run inside a cohort detail view.

CohortStatusCountsDto.title: CohortStatusCountsDto
CohortStatusCountsDto.description: Aggregate run counts by lifecycle status.

CohortSummaryDto.title: CohortSummaryDto
CohortSummaryDto.description: Summary row for cohort list and live updates.

EpisodeFailure.title: EpisodeFailure
EpisodeFailure.description: An episode that didn't complete successfully.

PollResponse.title: PollResponse
PollResponse.description: Ergon → Trainer: current batch status + trajectories if complete.

RunGenerationTurnDto.title: RunGenerationTurnDto
RunGenerationTurnDto.description: One model generation turn in a task execution.

SubmitRequest.title: SubmitRequest
SubmitRequest.description: Trainer → Ergon: start a batch of episodes.

Trajectory.title: Trajectory
Trajectory.description:
One agent's extracted trajectory from a completed episode.

Maps 1:1 to AgentTrajectory from extraction.py, plus metadata.

UpdateCohortRequest.title: UpdateCohortRequest
UpdateCohortRequest.description: Mutable cohort fields exposed through the operator API.

WeightSyncRequest.title: WeightSyncRequest
WeightSyncRequest.description:
Trainer → Ergon: restart vLLM with updated checkpoint.

For full-weight RFT: Ergon kills the vLLM process and restarts it
with --model pointing to checkpoint_path. Blocks until healthy.
